req.title: Interest accrual
req.statement: A savings account shall accrue interest daily using the tier rate and credit interest monthly on the last business day.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-016 requires daily interest accrual at tier rates and monthly credit on the last business day. Test coverage must validate: (1) positive path—interest correctly accrued and credited on month-end; (2) negative path—interest not credited on non-business-days or when preconditions fail; (3) boundary cases—edge dates (month-end, leap years, zero balance). These tests ensure the cron job executes deterministically and produces auditable ledger entries per account, with reconciliation variance detection.

tests.name: test_interest_accrual_positive_month_end_last_business_day
preconditions: Current date is last business day of month
No prior interest credited this month
expected: Account balance increased by interest amount
Transaction timestamp matches cron execution time
tests.executable:
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

def test_interest_accrual_positive_month_end_last_business_day():
    base_url = "http://localhost:8080"
    account_id = "ACC-001"
    
    payload = {
        "account_id": account_id,
        "month_end_date": "2024-01-31"
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/cron/interest", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    
    data = resp.json()
    assert data["status"] == "success"
    assert data["accounts_processed"] == 1
    assert data["interest_credited"] > 0
    
    ledger_resp = requests.get(
        f"{base_url}/accounts/{account_id}/ledger"
    )
    ledger = ledger_resp.json()
    interest_entries = [
        e for e in ledger if e["type"] == "INTEREST_CREDIT"
    ]
    assert len(interest_entries) >= 1
    assert interest_entries[-1]["amount"] == data["interest_credited"]

tests.name: test_interest_accrual_negative_non_business_day
preconditions: Current date is a weekend or holiday (non-business day)
No prior interest credited this month
actions: POST /cron/interest with account_id and non_business_day date
expected: HTTP 400 Bad Request or 422 Unprocessable Entity
Error message indicates non-business day rejection
tests.executable:
import requests
from datetime import datetime

def test_interest_accrual_negative_non_business_day():
    base_url = "http://localhost:8080"
    account_id = "ACC-002"
    
    payload = {
        "account_id": account_id,
        "month_end_date": "2024-01-28"
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/cron/interest", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code in [400, 422]
    
    data = resp.json()
    assert "error" in data or "error_code" in data
    assert "non-business day" in data.get("message", "").lower() or \
           data.get("error_code") == "INVALID_CRON_DATE"
    
    ledger_resp = requests.get(
        f"{base_url}/accounts/{account_id}/ledger"
    )
    ledger = ledger_resp.json()
    interest_entries = [
        e for e in ledger if e["type"] == "INTEREST_CREDIT" and \
        "2024-01-28" in e.get("timestamp", "")
    ]
    assert len(interest_entries) == 0

tests.name: test_interest_accrual_boundary_zero_balance
preconditions: Current date is last business day of month
expected: Ledger entry created with type=INTEREST_CREDIT and amount=0.00
trace: R-FIN-016: interest accrual at boundary (zero balance)
R-FIN-016: ledger entry per account (zero amount)
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_interest_accrual_boundary_zero_balance():
    base_url = "http://localhost:8080"
    account_id = "ACC-003"
    
    payload = {
        "account_id": account_id,
        "month_end_date": "2024-02-29"
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/cron/interest", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    
    data = resp.json()
    assert data["status"] == "success"
    assert data["interest_credited"] == 0.00
    
    acct_resp = requests.get(f"{base_url}/accounts/{account_id}")
    account = acct_resp.json()
    assert account["balance"] == 0.00
    
    ledger_resp = requests.get(
        f"{base_url}/accounts/{account_id}/ledger"
    )
    ledger = ledger_resp.json()
    interest_entries = [
        e for e in ledger if e["type"] == "INTEREST_CREDIT" and \
        "2024-02-29" in e.get("timestamp", "")
    ]
    assert len(interest_entries) == 1
    assert interest_entries[0]["amount"] == 0.00

tests.name: test_interest_accrual_boundary_leap_year_month_end
preconditions: Current date is Feb 29 (leap year) – last business day
actions: Verify actual interest credited matches expected
expected: Interest credited correctly accounts for 366-day leap year
trace: R-FIN-016: interest accrual at boundary (leap year)
R-FIN-016: daily accrual using correct day count
tests.executable:
import requests
from decimal import Decimal

def test_interest_accrual_boundary_leap_year_month_end():
    base_url = "http://localhost:8080"
    account_id = "ACC-004"
    balance = 50000.00
    annual_rate = 0.03
    
    payload = {
        "account_id": account_id,
        "month_end_date": "2024-02-29"
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/cron/interest", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    
    data = resp.json()
    expected_interest = balance * annual_rate / 366 * 29
    actual_interest = data["interest_credited"]
    
    assert abs(float(actual_interest) - expected_interest) < 0.01
    
    ledger_resp = requests.get(
        f"{base_url}/accounts/{account_id}/ledger"
    )
    ledger = ledger_resp.json()
    entries = [e for e in ledger if "2024-02-29" in e["timestamp"]]
    assert len(entries) >= 1

tests.name: test_interest_accrual_negative_inactive_account
preconditions: Savings account exists with status INACTIVE
Current date is last business day of month
expected: HTTP 200 OK (job completes) or 400 Bad Request
No interest credited to inactive account
Response indicates account was skipped or rejected
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_interest_accrual_negative_inactive_account():
    base_url = "http://localhost:8080"
    account_id = "ACC-INACTIVE-001"
    
    payload = {
        "account_id": account_id,
        "month_end_date": "2024-01-31"
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/cron/interest", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code in [200, 400]
    
    ledger_resp = requests.get(
        f"{base_url}/accounts/{account_id}/ledger"
    )
    ledger = ledger_resp.json()
    interest_entries = [
        e for e in ledger if e["type"] == "INTEREST_CREDIT" and \
        "2024-01" in e.get("timestamp", "")
    ]
    assert len(interest_entries) == 0
    
    acct_resp = requests.get(f"{base_url}/accounts/{account_id}")
    account = acct_resp.json()
    assert account["status"] == "INACTIVE"
